spk_a.transcript: 包括你的什么恩师, 什么靠山, 什么同党，是英雄好汉都站出来。

spk_b.transcript: 臣是嘉靖二十一年的进士，是天子的门生。

qa_result.question:
Which of the following statements were spoken by the first speaker? Please select the most appropriate option.
Candidate statements:
1) Then I, the Emperor, will make it clear: you are the Minister of the Ministry of Household Affairs,
2) Which department is Hai Rui the chief official of?
3) Who asked you to get it?
4) Your behind-the-scenes accomplice is Xu Jie, and I, the Emperor, have long known the whole truth,
5) I became an imperial scholar in the 21st year of Jiajing, and am the student of the Son of Heaven.
6) You still insist that this is a celebratory memorial now.
options: D. Unable to judge (insufficient information to confirm)
